prompt: A photorealistic futuristic vision of multiple cylindrical submarine data center modules arranged on the ocean floor, connected by glowing fiber optic cables, bioluminescent sea life swimming around them, brass-toned metallic surfaces with intricate riveted textures, deep indigo and teal ocean water, warm golden light beams penetrating from the surface above, no text, 16:9 aspect ratio.

scores.pf_reason: The modules are dome-shaped rather than cylindrical, and the brass-toned metallic surfaces are very dark, appearing more like aged bronze or steel.
